assertions.description: INCORRECT: thermal_analysis.zone_stitching lists the GND and HV copper zones (each 2382 mm2, F.Cu only, 2 vias each at 0.1 via/cm2). In an electrostatic adhesion plate, these interdigitated copper zones ARE the functional elements — the electrodes that generate the adhesion force. They are not thermal or electrical stitching planes. The 2 vias per zone are for connectivity, not thermal management. The zone_stitching classification implies thermal intent that does not apply to this design type. The via density of 0.1/cm2 is far below any thermal stitching standard, which should have disqualified these as stitching zones.
